sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى نَوْمٍ كَافٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ وَالْجَسَدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno i fizičko zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is essential for mental and physical health.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِالنَّوْمِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preporučuju spavanje u trajanju od osam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend sleeping for eight hours every night.

sentences.arabic: النَّوْمُ الْجَيِّدُ يُسَاعِدُ عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ وَيَزِيدُ مِنَ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةِ خِلَالَ النَّهَارِ.
sentences.translation: Dobar san pomaže u koncentraciji i povećava produktivnost tokom dana.
sentences.translationEn: Good sleep helps with concentration and increases productivity during the day.
